items.name: Blue Ponytail w/ Highlights
items.description: Achieve the perfect ponytail hairstyle with a voluminous, trendy look! Whether you love braided styles, dreads, or locs, this ponytail adds a chic, aesthetic touch to any outfit. Inspired by Y2K, preppy, and modern fashion, this style is easy to wear, stylish, and affordable. Secure it with a hair clip for a sleek or playful vibe, perfect for casual, sporty, or dressy looks! A cheap and trendy must-have for any hair collection!

items.name: Eiffel Tower Necklace - Olympic Edition
items.description: Add a touch of Parisian flair to your look with the Eiffel Tower Necklace - Olympic Edition! This elegant accessory combines the iconic Eiffel Tower with the Olympic spirit, making it the perfect addition to your avatar’s outfit. Whether you’re exploring the Roblox universe or celebrating the Games, this necklace will have you shining like a star in the City of Lights!
